title: data-cn comps-multiples pack
description: Multiples bundle for analysis-comps. Anchor (single ticker) or peers (batch). Always shaped as a list under tickers[] regardless of single/batch mode — analysis-comps consumes a uniform list. Tier 2 (yfinance).

multiples.description: Filtered multiples extracted from yfinance info. Keys absent when the underlying value is null. Currency-agnostic: ratios are unitless; market-cap-derived figures inherit yfinance currency (CNY for .SS/.SZ, HKD for .HK).

_yfinance_info.description: Full yfinance info dict, retained for downstream optional fields. analysis-comps reads `multiples` only.
